summary: Iteration 39 - License Management Features Testing Complete. All features verified: 1) Licensees cannot set their own starting balance (admin-only via reset-balance endpoint), 2) Master admin can edit licensee profile (name/timezone) via Edit Profile dialog in AdminLicensesPage, 3) License balance reset syncs with user's account_value, 4) Profit summary endpoint returns license.current_amount for licensees, 5) All three action buttons (Edit Profile, Change License Type, Reset Balance) work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Edit Profile dialog (lines 1556-1626) correctly uses adminAPI.updateMember to update licensee name and timezone
handleSaveProfile (lines 297-317) validates name is not empty before calling API
GET /api/admin/licenses (lines 3029-3077) enriches license data with user_timezone from users collection
POST /api/admin/licenses/{id}/reset-balance (lines 3283-3343) updates both license.current_amount and user.account_value
GET /api/profit/summary (lines 992-1033) checks for licensees and returns license.current_amount as account_value
POST /api/profit/simulate-withdrawal (lines 1044-1070) uses license balance for licensees
seed_data_creation: None - used existing licensees (Ryan TEST, Test Registration User, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: License management features verified: Edit Profile dialog allows master admin to update licensee name/timezone. Reset Balance updates both license.current_amount and user.account_value. Three action buttons per licensee: Edit Profile (UserCog), Change License Type (RefreshCw), Reset Balance (RotateCcw). 10 active licenses in system. Profit summary endpoint returns license balance for licensees.

licensees_cannot_set_starting_balance.details: Starting balance can only be set by admin via license invite creation or reset-balance endpoint. No endpoint exists for licensees to set their own balance.

master_admin_edit_licensee_profile.details: Edit Profile dialog (UserCog icon) opens with Full Name and Timezone fields. Uses PUT /api/admin/members/{user_id} to update. Verified via UI and API tests.

license_balance_reset_syncs.details: POST /api/admin/licenses/{id}/reset-balance updates both license.starting_amount, license.current_amount, and user.account_value. Creates transaction record when record_as_deposit=true.

profit_summary_returns_license_balance.details: GET /api/profit/summary checks for licensees and returns license.current_amount as account_value instead of calculating from deposits/trades.

withdrawal_simulation_uses_license_balan.details: POST /api/profit/simulate-withdrawal checks for licensees and uses license.current_amount for balance validation.

get_licenses_returns_user_timezone.details: GET /api/admin/licenses enriches response with user_timezone field from users collection for profile editing.

api_tests.POST /api/auth/login (master_admin): PASS - Returns token and user with role=master_admin
api_tests.GET /api/admin/licenses: PASS - Returns licenses with user_timezone field
api_tests.PUT /api/admin/members/{user_id}: PASS - Updates member name and timezone
api_tests.POST /api/admin/licenses/{id}/reset-bala: PASS - Updates license and user account_value
api_tests.GET /api/profit/summary: PASS - Returns license balance for licensees
api_tests.POST /api/profit/simulate-withdrawal: PASS - Uses license balance for licensees

ui_tests.license_management_page: PASS - Page loads with tabs for License Invites, Active Licenses, Transactions
ui_tests.active_licenses_tab: PASS - Shows 10 active licenses with User, Type, Starting Amount, Current Amount, Start Date, Actions columns
ui_tests.edit_profile_button: PASS - 10 Edit Profile buttons found (UserCog icon)
ui_tests.edit_profile_dialog: PASS - Opens with Full Name input and Timezone dropdown
ui_tests.reset_balance_button: PASS - 10 Reset Balance buttons found (RotateCcw icon)
ui_tests.reset_balance_dialog: PASS - Shows Current Balance, New Balance input, Notes textarea, Record as deposit checkbox
ui_tests.change_license_type_button: PASS - 10 Change License Type buttons found (RefreshCw icon)
ui_tests.change_license_type_dialog: PASS - Shows warning, current info, New License Type dropdown, New Starting Amount input
